issue.title: Accessibility issue: Form elements should have a visible label on /

findings.problemShort: form elements should have a visible label
findings.solutionShort: ensure that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
findings.solutionLong:
Fix all of the following:
  Only title used to generate label for form element
